purpose: Sheet-by-sheet, column-by-column schema of the Flagship Allocation Workbook (master) and the per-community satellite allocation workbooks (LH, PF). Drives check_allocation_readiness, explain_allocation_logic, and the LH/PF compute follow-on. No computation here — spec only.

source_files_observed.observed_in_repo: data/raw/datarails_unzipped/phase_cost_starter/Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx (CSV exports, one per sheet)
source_files_observed.version_delta_caveat: User referenced v08 (.xlsm). Repo has v3 (.xlsx CSV exports). v0.2 schema is authored from v3; bump to allocation_workbook_schema_v2 once v8 macro-free .xlsx is supplied.

source_files_observed.observed_in_repo: data/raw/datarails_unzipped/phase_cost_starter/LH Allocation 2025.10.xlsx (CSV exports: LH, PLJ, JCSList, AAJ, BSJ, BCPBL SB)

source_files_observed.note: PF tab is the most fully populated allocation example in the repo. Use as canonical compute reference.

source_files_observed.observed_in_repo: Not directly present. Closest analog: PLJ tab inside LH Allocation 2025.10.xlsx (Harmony slice) and the BCPDev row range inside JCSList tabs.
source_files_observed.freshness_caveat: Authoritative BCPDev PLJ 2026.03.31 export is not yet in repo. v0.2 readiness checks must surface this gap.

source_files_observed.observed_in_repo: JCSList tab inside LH Allocation 2025.10.xlsx and Parkway Allocation 2025.10.xlsx — same content (BCPDev/ASD/BCPBL/BCPI rows), one column block keyed by Tab=BCPDev.
JCSList tab inside LH/PF satellite workbooks — same content, one column block keyed by Tab=ASD.

flagship_master_v3.computation_state_reason: Lots (Manual Input) and Avg Projected Sales Price are empty for every row in Lot Mix & Pricing. Sales Basis % therefore = 0% for every phase, so Indirect Allocated and Land Allocated resolve to $0 across all communities. Direct Budget (LandDev) is populated for many phases but does not compute through to per-lot output without sales basis.

sheets.csv_basename: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Lot Mix & Pricing.csv
sheets.subtotal_rows: Per-community subtotals plus GRAND TOTAL appended at bottom (rows 82-90).

columns.name: Community
columns.notes: Must match Allocation Engine and Indirect & Land Pools community spelling.

columns.name: Job Id
columns.notes: Sparse — only ~30% of phases have Job Id today. Empty for unbudgeted phases.

columns.name: Lots (Manual Input)
columns.notes: EMPTY for every observed row. Tie-Out check expects this to match LotData.

columns.name: Tie-Out
columns.notes: Currently equals LotData because Manual Input is empty — masking the check.

columns.name: Avg Projected Sales Price
columns.notes: EMPTY for every observed row. This is the master blocker for Allocation Engine sales-basis computation.

columns.name: Total Projected Sales
columns.formula: Lots (Manual Input) * Avg Projected Sales Price
columns.notes: Drives Sales Basis % on Allocation Engine.

sheets.csv_basename: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Indirect & Land Pools.csv

columns.name: Budget Override
columns.notes: Blue-fill cell. Used when LandDev budget is wrong/missing. EMPTY for every observed row.

columns.name: Effective Budget
columns.formula: IF(Budget Override blank, Current Budget (LandDev), Budget Override)
columns.notes: Feeds Allocation Engine via SUMIFS on Community.

sheets.csv_basename: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Allocation Engine.csv

columns.name: Total Proj Sales
columns.formula: lookup from Lot Mix & Pricing.Total Projected Sales for (Community, Phase, Lot Type)

columns.name: Sales Basis % (Community)
columns.formula: Total Proj Sales / SUM(Total Proj Sales WHERE Community = this.Community)

columns.name: Community Indirect Pool
columns.formula: SUMIFS(Indirect & Land Pools.Effective Budget, Type=INDIRECT, Community=this.Community)

columns.name: Community Land Pool
columns.formula: SUMIFS(Indirect & Land Pools.Effective Budget, Type=LAND, Community=this.Community)

sheets.csv_basename: Flagship Allocation Workbook v3.xlsx - Per-Lot Output.csv

columns.name: Direct Budget Override
columns.notes: Blue-fill. EMPTY for all observed rows.

columns.name: Effective Direct Budget
columns.formula: IF(Direct Budget Override blank, Direct Budget (LandDev), Direct Budget Override)

columns.name: Indirect Allocated
columns.formula: lookup from Allocation Engine for (Community, Phase, Lot Type)

columns.name: Total Cost
columns.formula: Effective Direct Budget + Indirect Allocated + Land Allocated

sheets.structure: Three vertically stacked sections: (1) Summary per lot — Previous and Remaining Sales/Allocations with cost/lot, sales/lot, margin; (2) Budgeting — by Phase x {Directs, Land, Indirects} with side-by-side LandDev vs QBPLJ/QBBSJ/QBGL actuals and an Adj/Base column; (3) Allocation — per (Phase, ProdType, Lots) with explicit Sales, Cost-of-{land,direct,water,indirects}, Total cost, Margin, PRSV%, CRSV% and Allocation 1-10 columns tying to GL transactions.
key_columns_budgeting: Source=LandDev: Orig Budget / Curr Budget / Actuals

sheets.structure: List of QBD jobs across all DevCo entities (Tab field). Per-job: Project, Phase, QB Job, Orig Budget, LAND ACQUISITION (1010), INTEREST EXPENSE (3020), Adj Budget, ITD Actuals. Plus an 'Adj' block and 'Previous' block on the right for delta analysis between pulls.
sheets.notes: When Phase is 'Mapping needed' or QB Job is 'Mapping needed', the row blocks downstream allocation for that phase. v0.2 must surface the Mapping needed count per community as a readiness signal.
Likely Actuals/Adjustments by Job. Format mirrors LH satellite. Not directly required for v0.2 per-lot compute; included in schema for future use.

lh_satellite_v_2025_10.scope: Lomond Heights (Ben Lomond) primary; PLJ tab carries Harmony slice; BCPBL SB tab carries Ben Lomond balance sheet
lh_satellite_v_2025_10.computation_state_reason: Direct budgets, raw land basis ($34.4M), and assumed prices ($150K SFR / $110K TH / $80K MF / $5.7M Comm) are populated, but Indirect cost-of and Sales/Margin formulas resolve to #ERROR! across the Allocation section. Indirects pool shows Capitalized Interest as #ERROR!. v0.2 should flag LH as 'inputs partial — cannot replicate workbook'.

sheets.structure: Same three-section pattern as PF tab (Summary per lot, Budgeting, Allocation). Phases observed: 1 Open, 2A SFR/TH, 2B SFR/TH, 2C SFR/TH, 2D SFR, 3 Comm, 4 Open, 5 MF, 6A/6B/6C SFR.

Standard QBD P&L by Job pivot. Columns are jobs (Harmony A4.1, B1, B2, B3, Clubhouse, MF1, MF2, Plat 4-14, Nathan, Waddell). Rows are P&L line items: Income (Proceeds from Land Sale, Lot Sales), COGS line items by trade (Earthwork, Engineering, Excavation, etc.), Expenses (Warranty Expense, Basis of Lots Sold, Marketing).
sheets.scope_observed: Harmony jobs only (despite being in LH workbook — likely a copy/embed error or shared ref).
sheets.key_lookup: Used by satellite Budgeting section's QBPLJ Actuals column.

sheets.scope_observed: Salem Fields balance sheet (similar embed-mismatch as PLJ). Per-job columns: 750 North Improvements, Offsite Sewer, Salem Nature Park, Salem Phase 1, Salem Phase 2, Salem Phase 3, Salem Water Tank, Salem - Other.
sheets.key_lookup: Used by satellite Budgeting section's QBBSJ Actuals column.

sheets.scope_observed: Ben Lomond balance sheet. Per-phase columns: Offsites, Phase 2A, Phase 2B, Phase 2D plus a No-name catch-all.

sheets.structure: Sundance Bay loan terms (Principal $29,316,245.79, 8.000%, 30/360, Loan date 12/30/2024, Maturity 12/30/2026) plus 24-period amortization table.
sheets.notes: Drives Capitalized Interest line in Indirects pool. Errors here cascade to LH Indirect total.
Identical structure and content to PF satellite JCSList. Treat as shared lookup table.

cross_sheet_keys.(Community, Phase, Lot Type): Primary 3-tuple shared by Lot Mix & Pricing, Allocation Engine, Per-Lot Output (master).
cross_sheet_keys.(Tab, Project, Phase, QB Job): Primary 4-tuple in JCSList; Tab maps to DevCo entity.
cross_sheet_keys.Community: Joins Indirect & Land Pools to Allocation Engine via SUMIFS. Naming drift between ClickUp subdivision, QBD Project, and workbook Community is the day-one crosswalk surface.

indirect_community_by_sales_basis_pct.current_blocker: Avg Projected Sales Price empty in Lot Mix & Pricing

sheets_used: PF tab Cost of water column
water_by_letter.current_blocker: Master Flagship workbook has no water columns. Only satellite tabs encode water cost. Master schema must add water before LH/PF compute can roundtrip.

sheets_used: PF tab Margin computation (warranty implicit in Cost-of-direct + Cost-of-indirects)

applies_to_rows: Arrowhead Springs phase rows where Lot Type expands across 'AS 1-3', 'AS 4-6'-style range buckets

caveats: B2 and D1 are 'Previous Sales/Allocations' — do not re-allocate
Indirect pool sums to negative ($-1,249,493.54) — workbook treats as credit; flag for accounting review

blockers: Range-row method unratified for AS 1-3 / AS 4-6 phases
PLJ embed in LH workbook is the only QBD actuals visible — needs canonical BCPDev PLJ pull
BSJ embed in LH workbook only — needs canonical Salem BSJ pull
Not present in master Allocation Engine; only in JCSList and Indirect pool entries

Hillcrest.reason: Org-wide GL coverage post-2017-02 deferred per PROJECT_STATE rules.

Flagship Belmont.reason: Org-wide GL coverage post-2017-02 deferred per PROJECT_STATE rules.

open_questions_for_source_owner: Confirm naming: Flagship_Allocation_Workbook 08.xlsm (referenced) vs Flagship Allocation Workbook v3 (in repo). Are v8 sheet names/cols unchanged from v3?
Where is BCPDev PLJ 2026.03.31.CSV? Is the LH-embedded Harmony PLJ extract an authoritative slice or a stale copy?
Are JCS BCPD.xlsm and JCS ASD.xlsm the same content as the per-Tab slices of JCSList in the satellite workbooks?
Master Flagship v3 lacks Water and Warranty columns. Are these intentionally only at the satellite level, or should master add them?
PF Indirect total is negative ($-1.25M). Confirm sign convention (credit balance vs. error).

version_history.author: Agent B
version_history.notes: Initial schema derived from Flagship v3 + LH/PF satellite 2025.10. Pending v8 macro-free .xlsx supply.
